description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named release that triggers on push events to tags matching 'v*' and any branch. The workflow should run on a windows-latest environment, checking out the repository with submodules and a full fetch depth. It should then determine if the push is for a tag or not, and extract version information. The workflow should build algorithms and OpenHashTab using PowerShell scripts, create an installer with version information, and upload the installer and unpacked files as artifacts. If the push is for a tag, create a GitHub release with the installer and symbols.
